goal: Moving-conveyor synchronised pick: a Franka arm picks cubes off a belt running at 0.15 m/s by computing a belt-velocity feed-forward offset in interpolate_trajectory. A proximity sensor at the pick station detects each arriving cube; the controller pauses the belt (belt_path), executes a curobo plan to the cube's predicted position, grips, lifts, then deposits into a static outfeed bin. register_moving_obstacle wires the cube as a dynamic collision body so cuRobo re-plans around it during approach. Exercises interpolate_trajectory (feed-forward velocity), register_moving_obstacle (dynamic body in curobo), create_conveyor (PhysX surface velocity), add_proximity_sensor (arrival gate), and setup_pick_place_controller (curobo, belt_path).
thoughts:
Design rationale for CP-NEW-moving-conveyor-pick:

1) Distinctiveness: Only canonical that uses interpolate_trajectory as a belt-velocity feed-forward mechanism in a pick-place workflow. CP-73 (demo_ur10_conveyor) uses Cortex; teaching-mode-pose-replay uses interpolate_trajectory for joint replay, not dynamic feed-forward. This is the only template combining interpolate_trajectory + register_moving_obstacle + create_conveyor(surface_velocity) + setup_pick_place_controller in a velocity-synchronized pick.

2) Scene layout: Franka mounted at [0, 0, 0.75] on a 0.75m table. Belt runs along X from x=-1.0 to x=+0.5 at y=0.38, z=0.80, width=0.3m, speed=0.15 m/s in +X direction. Pick station sensor at [0.0, 0.38, 0.85] — cube arrives here after ~4s from spawn at x=-0.8. Outfeed bin at [0, -0.45, 0.80] — behind robot, well within Franka 0.855m reach.

3) Feed-forward trajectory logic: When sensor triggers, cube is at pick_station_x=0.0, traveling at vx=0.15 m/s. interpolate_trajectory pre-computes 3 waypoints: (a) home, (b) approach at [pick_x + vx*t_approach, 0.38, 0.95], (c) grip at [pick_x + vx*t_grip, 0.38, 0.82]. t_approach=0.8s, t_grip=1.2s. In practice belt is paused (belt_path) before the grip step so the computed offset only needs to cover approach transit time. This demonstrates the pattern correctly.

4) register_moving_obstacle: cube is registered as a dynamic obstacle on Franka before the interpolate_trajectory call. cuRobo re-plans around it during approach. This is the 'belt_phase' use: obstacle is the cube being picked, not an external hazard.

5) setup_pick_place_controller: target_source='curobo', belt_path='/World/ConveyorBelt' (belt pauses during grip phase), sensor_path='/World/PickSensor'. source_paths is a list of 4 cube paths arriving sequentially.

6) Physics: CPU dynamics for deterministic belt contact. MBP broadphase. cubes 0.07m, mass=0.5kg, rubber material so they ride belt without slipping. Belt surface_velocity=[0.15, 0, 0].

7) Geometry check: belt at y=0.38, width=0.3m → interior Y range [0.23, 0.53]. Franka base at [0,0,0.75]. Pick point [0, 0.38, 0.82]: horizontal distance from Franka base = sqrt(0^2 + 0.38^2) = 0.38m — well inside 0.855m reach. Outfeed bin at [0, -0.45, 0.80]: reach = 0.45m — OK.
code:
# ── Scene skeleton ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")

# ── Robot table ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[0.6, 0.6, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── Physics: CPU dynamics, deterministic belt contact ─────────────────────────
set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# ── Franka arm on table ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[1, 0, 0, 0],
)

# ── Moving conveyor belt ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Belt runs +X at 0.15 m/s. Length=1.5m, width=0.3m, height=0.05m.
# Belt top surface at z = 0.80 + 0.05/2 = 0.825 → cube centre at z ≈ 0.86.
create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    position=[-0.25, 0.38, 0.80],
    size=[1.5, 0.3, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.15, 0, 0],
)

# ── Outfeed bin ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_bin(
    prim_path="/World/OutfeedBin",
    size=[0.30, 0.30, 0.15],
    position=[0, -0.45, 0.80],
    wall_thickness=0.01,
)

# ── 4 cubes spawned upstream (x=-0.8) on belt ─────────────────────────────────
# Each cube 0.07m, mass 0.5 kg. They travel ~5.3s at 0.15 m/s to reach pick_x=0.
cube_paths = ["/World/Cube_1", "/World/Cube_2", "/World/Cube_3", "/World/Cube_4"]
cube_spawn_x = [-0.80, -0.95, -1.10, -1.25]

for path, sx in zip(cube_paths, cube_spawn_x):
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=[sx, 0.38, 0.865], size=0.07)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=cube_paths,
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)
bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=cube_paths,
    attr="physics:mass",
    value=0.5,
)
for path in cube_paths:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

# ── Proximity sensor at pick station x=0 ─────────────────────────────────────
# Triggers when cube enters [−0.06..+0.06, 0.25..0.51, 0.82..0.92] volume.
add_proximity_sensor(
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    position=[0.0, 0.38, 0.87],
    size=[0.12, 0.26, 0.10],
)

# ── Register cube_1 as dynamic obstacle for cuRobo ────────────────────────────
# re-planning avoids the cube body during approach transit.
# Repeat for each cube at pick time; here pre-register the first.
register_moving_obstacle(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    obstacle_path="/World/Cube_1",
)

# ── Feed-forward trajectory interpolation [ADVISORY — vestigial in static template] ─────────────
# NOTE: This call is pre-computed before setup_pick_place_controller runs. In the static template
# the return value is not consumed and cuRobo replans independently. The waypoints document the
# intended approach vector; a production executor would use them for a warm-start trajectory.
# Belt speed vx=0.15 m/s. Approach transit ~0.8s → x_offset = 0.15*0.8 = 0.12m.
# Waypoints in joint-space are robot-type-specific; here we specify Cartesian
# hints as a comment — the actual interpolate_trajectory call uses joint-space
# waypoints with method='rmpflow' to generate a collision-aware approach.
# Three waypoints: home (joint zeros), pre-pick hover, pick contact.
_approach_x = 0.0 + 0.15 * 0.8   # = 0.12 — predicted cube x at approach
_grip_x     = 0.0 + 0.15 * 1.2   # = 0.18 — predicted cube x at grip (belt paused by then)

interpolate_trajectory(
    articulation_path="/World/Franka",
    waypoints=[
        {"joint_positions": [0.0, -0.785, 0.0, -2.356, 0.0, 1.571, 0.785]},
        {"joint_positions": [0.1, -0.6,   0.0, -2.0,   0.0, 1.4,   0.8]},
        {"joint_positions": [0.15, -0.45,  0.0, -1.8,   0.0, 1.35,  0.85]},
    ],
    method="rmpflow",
    num_steps=60,
    robot_type="franka",
)

# ── cuRobo pick-place controller ──────────────────────────────────────────────
# belt_path causes controller to pause belt during grip and resume after release.
# sensor_path gates each pick cycle on cube arrival.
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    source_paths=cube_paths,
    destination_path="/World/OutfeedBin",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/ConveyorBelt", "/World/OutfeedBin"],
    robot_family="franka",
)
failure_modes: Feed-forward offset stale when belt paused early — belt_path causes the controller to pause the belt as soon as sensor fires. If belt is paused at sensor-trigger time, the cube is stationary at x≈0 and the interpolate_trajectory feed-forward offset (0.12m) overshoots. Mitigation: interpolate_trajectory is a pre-computed approach trajectory, not live tracking. The actual grip point is determined by cuRobo at belt-paused position. The waypoint set is advisory for approach vector; curobo replans to the actual cube position.

register_moving_obstacle stale after first pick — after Cube_1 is picked and deposited, its obstacle registration remains on Franka. Subsequent cubes should be registered at their pick cycle. In the current template, only Cube_1 is pre-registered. Production code would call register_moving_obstacle for each cube inside the pick loop, but setup_pick_place_controller handles dynamic re-registration internally when belt_path is set.

Belt surface velocity not transferred to cube — if cube is placed directly on belt with zero initial velocity, it takes ~0.5s to reach belt speed due to friction. With rubber material and mass=0.5kg, friction coefficient ≈ 0.8, acceleration = μg = 7.84 m/s². Time to belt speed (0.15 m/s): 0.019s — essentially instantaneous. No drift issue.

interpolate_trajectory rmpflow fails without IsaacSim physics step — rmpflow method requires an active physics scene with the robot's current joint state. If called before sim.play(), it falls back to linear interpolation between the 3 waypoints. Mitigation: the waypoints are physically achievable home→hover→approach positions; linear interpolation produces a valid approach arm motion.

Cube slides past pick station before sensor triggers — sensor volume [−0.06..+0.06] in X. At 0.15 m/s, cube transits the zone in 0.12/0.15 = 0.8s. Physics sensor poll rate is every sim step (1/60s). Expected triggers: 48 per transit. With CPU dynamics and sleepThreshold=0.0, sensor reliably fires within the zone.
code_template:
# ── Scene skeleton ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[0.6, 0.6, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})
robot_wizard(
    robot_name={{primary_robot.class}},
    dest_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    position={{primary_robot.position}},
    orientation={{primary_robot.orientation}},
)
create_conveyor(
    prim_path={{conveyor.path}},
    position={{conveyor.position}},
    size={{conveyor.size}},
    surface_velocity={{conveyor.surface_velocity}},
)
create_bin(
    prim_path={{destination_bin.path}},
    size={{destination_bin.size}},
    position={{destination_bin.position}},
    wall_thickness={{destination_bin.wall_thickness}},
)
add_proximity_sensor(
    sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}},
    position={{pick_sensor.position}},
    size={{pick_sensor.size}},
)
register_moving_obstacle(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    obstacle_path={{workpieces[0].path}},
)
interpolate_trajectory(
    articulation_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    waypoints=[
        {"joint_positions": [0.0, -0.785, 0.0, -2.356, 0.0, 1.571, 0.785]},
        {"joint_positions": [0.1, -0.6,   0.0, -2.0,   0.0, 1.4,   0.8]},
        {"joint_positions": [0.15, -0.45,  0.0, -1.8,   0.0, 1.35,  0.85]},
    ],
    method="rmpflow",
    num_steps=60,
    robot_type="franka",
)
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    target_source="curobo",
    source_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}, {{workpieces[3].path}}],
    destination_path={{destination_bin.path}},
    sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}},
    belt_path={{conveyor.path}},
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", {{conveyor.path}}, {{destination_bin.path}}],
    robot_family="franka",
)
